Set the ID to the the same ID: as the zone or button you want this trigger
to get activated by, and action, number and
text according to this:
0: Do nothing
1: Kill any entity on the team TEXT
2: Ragdoll any entity on the team TEXT for NUMBER seconds
3: Finish current mission
4: Finish current mission, only if all enemies are dead
5: Spawn object from Resources at TEXT path
Format: ObjPath;x;y;rot;size;forcex;forcey;id;activID;team
8: RAND() - activates a random number from the team field (i.e, 1,2,3,4,5)
Weapon Preset
The name of the weapon. Appears in the weapon view and others.
What the weapon will do upon firing. 0 is a normal bullet, 1 is instantiating the tracerLine at the barrel
The delay between firing when LMB is held down. 1 is one second between firing
Used in AIs. Average time between shots. Set to the fire delay on auto weapons, set lower on semu auto.
The damage the weapon deals when something is shot
How fast a weapon aims to the cursor. 1 is very slow aiming, 10 is fast.
How much physical force the weapon will apply when shitting something.
How much the weapon goes up when fired, in degrees.
How quickly the entity recovers the recoil when the weapon is fired.
How far the weapon can shoot. Any raycast hits outside this range is ignored.
How many projectiles this weapon will fire. Most guns gave 1, shotguns have multiple.
Self explanatory.
Affects what enemies can get this weapon randomly. Pistols and other less powerful/low ranking guns get lower power levels, more powerful ones get higher.
If true, weapon will shoot continuously, like the old times. If false, it will only shoot on button down.
The sprite of the weapon that is held in the entity's hands.
